title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabAlley - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabAlley - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FabAlley! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!
